features.title: Harden network policy, file modes, and close behavior
features.description: Add local CIDR/domain validation, SandboxFile mode support, and idempotent provider close behavior.
evidence: SDK accepts outbound_cidr_allowlist and inbound_cidr_allowlist and rejects invalid network policy locally
SandboxFile.mode applies chmod through argv-style run_command after writes
ModalSandboxProvider.close is idempotent for owned and attached sandboxes
uv run pytest tests/test_sandbox.py tests/test_provider_modal.py tests/test_cli.py passed: 110 passed

features.title: Add Modal-native named sandbox lifecycle helpers
features.description: Support sandbox names, tags, from_name, and carefully scoped get_or_create behavior.
evidence: Sandbox.create accepts name and tags and forwards them to Modal Sandbox.create
Sandbox.from_name attaches by Modal sandbox name and translates Modal NotFoundError into SandboxNotFoundError
Sandbox.get_or_create creates only after SandboxNotFoundError and does not swallow other provider errors
CLI supports --name, --tag, --sandbox-name, named domain lookup, and named stop workflows
uv run pytest tests/test_sandbox.py tests/test_provider_modal.py tests/test_cli.py tests/test_packaging.py passed: 138 passed

features.title: Clarify volume checkpoints and Modal-native snapshot APIs
features.description: Add workspace_checkpoint plus filesystem/directory snapshot and image mount helpers while preserving create_snapshot compatibility.

features.title: Expose filesystem stat, watch, and workspace sync helpers
features.description: Add JSON-friendly stat/watch wrappers and a sync_workspace helper for volume-backed workflows.

features.title: Add explicit post-create source seeding
features.description: Support public git/tarball seeding with argv commands, credential redaction, and secret-based private auth guidance.

features.title: Tighten packaging and CI compatibility coverage
features.description: Consider a Modal major-version upper bound and add CI coverage across supported Python versions.
